{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = The Archer
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Archer]] is a single template of all archery.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18">''Reaper'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
